parameters.subject: =🏗️ New Site Ready for Review — {{ $('Parse and Validate Config JSON').first().json.business_name }}
parameters.message:
=

New Website Build Complete

A new client site has been built and is awaiting your review before going live.

Client{{ $('Parse and Validate Config JSON').first().json.business_name }}
Tier{{ $('Parse and Validate Config JSON').first().json.tier }}
Preview URLhttps://{{ $('Vercel — Trigger Deploy').first().json.url }}
GitHub RepoView on GitHub
Notes{{ $('Build Pipeline Transform').first().json.notes || '(none)' }}

Review the preview URL above. When approved, merge the main branch in GitHub to push live.

Config JSON
{{ JSON.stringify($('Inject Hero Image URL').first().json.config_json, null, 2) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const tally = $('Build Pipeline Transform').first().json;

const scrapedContent = $('Firecrawl — Scrape Existing Site').isExecuted
  ? ($('Firecrawl — Scrape Existing Site').first().json?.data?.markdown ?? '')
  : '';

const schema = {"client":{"name":"","slug":"","tier":1,"package":"","phone":"","address":"","city":"","state":""},"brand":{"logo_url":null,"primary_color":"","secondary_color":"","font_heading":"Inter","font_body":"Inter"},"seo":{"title":"","description":""},"pages":[],"nav_links":[{"label":"","href":""}],"components":{"home":[]},"webhooks":{"contact_form":null,"contact_form_enhanced":null,"appointment_url":null,"calendly_mode":"link","payment_url":null},"lead_magnet":{"webhook_url":null,"headline":"","button_text":"","asset_url":null},"review_request":{"google_review_url":null,"webhook_url":null,"prompt_text":""},"map_embed_url":null,"services":[{"icon":"","title":"","description":""}],"testimonials":[{"name":"","company":"","quote":"","rating":5}],"team":[{"name":"","title":"","bio":"","photo_url":null}],"pricing":[{"name":"","price":"","billing_period":"/mo","features":[],"is_featured":false,"cta_text":"Get Started","cta_url":"/contact"}],"faq":[{"question":"","answer":""}],"content":{"hero":{"headline":"","subheadline":"","cta_text":"","cta_href":"","background_image_url":null},"cta_banner":{"headline":"","subheadline":"","cta_text":"","cta_href":""},"stripe_payment":{"label":"","url":null,"variant":"primary"},"footer":{"tagline":"","social_links":[]}},"image_search_query":""};

const systemPart = [
  'You are a professional web copywriter and JSON generator for Apex Agentics website builds.',
  '',
  'Output ONLY valid raw JSON — no markdown fences, no explanation, no commentary.',
  '',
  'COPY QUALITY RULES — these override everything:',
  '- Every line of copy must be specific to THIS business',
  '- Never use generic phrases like "end-to-end solutions", "modern businesses", "cutting edge", "seamless experience"',
  '- hero.headline must name the specific service AND location if provided (e.g. "Simpsonville\'s Premier Boxing Gym" not "Train Like a Champion")',
  '- hero.subheadline must include one concrete differentiator pulled from the scraped content',
  '- All service titles and descriptions must match actual services this business offers — pull from scraped content, do not invent',
  '- FAQ questions must be questions real customers of THIS specific business type actually ask',
  '- CTA banner headline must reference a specific action relevant to this business (e.g. "Book Your First Class Free" for a gym, not "Get Started Today")',
  '- footer tagline must be unique to this business, not generic',
  '- content.footer.social_links: always output an empty array [] — never guess social URLs',
  '',
  'PAGE AND COMPONENT RULES:',
  '- package "Starter" → pages: ["home","contact"]',
  '- package "Full Site" → pages: ["home","services","about","contact","pricing","faq"]',
  '- package "Tier 2" → same as Full Site, tier: 2',
  '',
  'Component matrix — use EXACTLY these arrays:',
  '  home:     ["NavBar","HeroSection","ServiceGrid","TestimonialCarousel","PricingTable","FAQAccordion","CTABanner","Footer"]',
  '  services: ["NavBar","ServiceGrid","PricingTable","CTABanner","Footer"]',
  '  about:    ["NavBar","TeamSection","CTABanner","Footer"]',
  '  contact:  ["NavBar","ContactForm","GoogleMapEmbed","Footer"]',
  '  pricing:  ["NavBar","PricingTable","FAQAccordion","CTABanner","Footer"]',
  '  faq:      ["NavBar","FAQAccordion","CTABanner","Footer"]',
  '',
  'BRAND COLOR RULES:',
  '- If client provides a color name (e.g. "black"), convert to the correct hex code (#000000)',
  '- primary_color and secondary_color must always be valid hex codes',
  '- If only one color is provided, derive a complementary secondary color',
  '- Never leave color fields as empty strings',
  '',
  'FIELD RULES:',
  '- client.package: REQUIRED — must be exactly one of: Starter, Full Site, Tier 2. Copy the normalized package value.',
  '- client.slug: lowercase, hyphens only, no spaces, derived from business name',
  '- client.package: copy from the Package field provided',
  '- client.tier: 1 for Starter and Full Site, 2 for Tier 2',
  '- nav_links: one entry per page in config.pages. href = "/" for home, "/services", "/about", "/contact", "/pricing", "/faq". Labels are business-appropriate',
  '- services: exactly 3 or 6 items; icon must be one of: Zap,Globe,BarChart3,MessageSquare,FileText,Headphones,Wrench,Settings,Shield,Rocket',
  '- testimonials: at least 3 items; fields are name, company, quote, rating (1-5 integer)',
  '- team: fields are name, title, bio, photo_url',
  '- pricing: exactly 2 or 3 tiers; fields are name, price, billing_period, features (array), is_featured (boolean), cta_text, cta_url',
  '- faq: generate 3-5 questions relevant to the specific business',
  '- If appointment_url is provided copy it to webhooks.appointment_url',
  '- If payment_url is provided copy it to content.stripe_payment.url',
  '- If google_review_url is provided copy it to review_request.google_review_url',
  '- map_embed_url: always null',
  '- brand.logo_url: always null (logo added manually after build)',
  '- lead_magnet, review_request, stripe_payment: generate realistic placeholder text even if not used',
  '- image_search_query: 2-4 word Unsplash search phrase describing this business visually (e.g. "crossfit gym workout", "house cleaning service", "boxing gym training", "dental office modern"). Do NOT include the business name or city — just the visual concept.',
  '- content.hero.background_image_url: always set to null (pipeline will inject a real image via Unsplash)',
  '- team[].photo_url: always set to null (placeholder avatar will render — never use picsum or fake headshots)',
  '',
  'You MUST output JSON with this EXACT structure (same key names, same nesting — fill in real values):',
  JSON.stringify(schema),
  '',
  'Output raw JSON only — no markdown, no explanation'
].join('\n');

const businessPart = [
  'Generate a config.json for this business:',
  'Name: ' + tally.business_name,
  'Phone: ' + (tally.business_phone || ''),
  'Address: ' + (tally.business_address || '') + ', ' + (tally.business_city || '') + ', ' + (tally.business_state || ''),
  'Tier: ' + (tally.tier || 1),
  'Primary color: ' + (tally.primary_color || '#4F46E5'),
  'Secondary color: ' + (tally.secondary_color || '#06B6D4'),
  'Tagline: ' + (tally.tagline || ''),
  'Package: ' + (tally.package || 'Starter'),
  'Appointment URL: ' + (tally.appointment_url || 'null'),
  'Payment URL: ' + (tally.payment_url || 'null'),
  'Google Review URL: ' + (tally.google_review_url || 'null'),
  'Notes: ' + (tally.notes || ''),
  '',
  'Scraped website content:',
  scrapedContent
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { prompt: systemPart + '\n\n---\n\n' + businessPart } }];

nodes.name: Build Pipeline Transform
nodes.notes: CUT THIS NODE and paste it into the Website Build Pipeline workflow. This REPLACES the existing 'Transform Tally Payload' node. Connect: new webhook trigger → new Respond → THIS NODE → Has Existing Website?

nodes.name: Build Pipeline Respond
nodes.notes: CUT THIS NODE and paste it into the Website Build Pipeline workflow. Connect it between the new webhook trigger and the Transform Tally Payload node.

nodes.name: Build Pipeline Trigger
nodes.notes: CUT THIS NODE and paste it into the Website Build Pipeline workflow. Connect it to the Transform Tally Payload node (replacing the old Tally Form Submission trigger). Then delete this node from this workflow.

body.tagline: Become the Best Version of You
